chapter_title.en: Chapter on One Who Bequeaths an Insufficient Amount for Hajj

parts.text: 2929 - وَ كَتَبَ إِلَيْهِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْحُضَيْنِيُّ : أَنَّ اِبْنَ عَمِّي أَوْصَى أَنْ يُحَجَّ عَنْهُ بِخَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ دِينَاراً فِي

text: كُلِّ سَنَةٍ فَلَيْسَ يَكْفِي فَمَا تَأْمُرُنِي فِي ذَلِكَ فَكَتَبَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «تَجْعَلُ حَجَّتَيْنِ فِي حَجَّةٍ إِنْ شَاءَ اَللَّهُ إِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَالِمٌ بِذَلِكَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2929 - Ali ibn Muhammad al-Hudhayni wrote to Imam (as):
"My cousin instructed in his will that Hajj be performed on his behalf every year with fifteen dinars, but this amount is not sufficient. What do you command me to do in this matter?"
Imam (as) wrote back: "Combine two Hajj pilgrimages into one, God willing. Allah (swt) is aware of this."
